summary: Explore Page / Gallery testing complete. All 16 features verified. Backend: 100% pass rate (16/16 tests). Frontend: 100% pass rate. Explore page at /app/explore loads with category filters, sort options, infinite scroll, stickiness triggers, cinematic 4:5 story cards with hook overlays, CTA variants, urgency text, and social proof badges.
critical_code_review_comments: Explore page loads at /app/explore with 'Explore Stories' title and story count (30 stories to discover)
Category filter pills visible with counts: All (30), Emotional (8), Mystery (2), Kids (30), Viral Hooks (15)
Category filters work correctly - clicking Emotional shows 8 stories, Kids shows 30 stories
Sort dropdown shows 'Trending' by default, can switch to 'New' and 'Most Continued'
Stories display as cinematic 4:5 cards (aspect-[4/5]) with hook text overlaid on darkened thumbnail
Social proof badges working: 'Trending' (amber), 'Early story' (violet), 'Just dropped' (emerald)
Urgency text below hook: 'Someone just continued this', 'This story isn't finished', 'Your turn to continue', 'Be the one who writes what's next'
CTA variants rotate correctly: 'See What Happens Next', 'Continue This Story', 'What Happens Next?'
Stickiness triggers appear between rows with gradient text ('This story has no ending yet...', 'These stories are still being written...')
Infinite scroll works: IntersectionObserver loads 12 items per batch (24 -> 36 cards on scroll)
End-of-list message appears: 'You've explored all stories' with create CTA
Create Story button in header navigates to /app/story-video-studio
Clicking story card navigates to /app/story-video-studio with remix_data prefilled
Backend explore endpoint returns stories, next_cursor, total, categories
Presigned R2 URLs for thumbnails working correctly

test_credentials.note: Explore endpoint is PUBLIC - no auth required

context_for_next_testing_agent: Explore Page testing complete. All features verified: (1) Page loads at /app/explore with title and story count. (2) Category filters: All, Emotional, Mystery, Kids, Viral Hooks with counts. (3) Clicking filters reloads stories. (4) Sort dropdown: Trending (default), New, Most Continued. (5) Cinematic 4:5 story cards with hook overlaid on thumbnail. (6) Social proof badges: Trending, Early story, Just dropped. (7) Urgency text below hook. (8) CTA variants rotate. (9) Stickiness triggers between rows. (10) Infinite scroll loads 12 per batch. (11) End-of-list message with create CTA. (12) Create Story button navigates to studio. (13) Card click navigates to studio with remix_data. (14) Backend explore endpoint works. (15) Category filters work. (16) Lazy loaded images.

Feature_1_Page_Loads.details: Explore page loads at /app/explore with data-testid='explore-page', title 'Explore Stories', count '30 stories to discover'

Feature_2_Category_Filters_Visible.details: All 5 category pills visible: All (30), Emotional (8), Mystery (2), Kids (30), Viral Hooks (15)

Feature_3_Emotional_Filter.details: Clicking Emotional filter shows 8 stories, button shows active amber state

Feature_5_Sort_Dropdown.details: Sort shows 'Trending' by default, can switch to 'New' and 'Most Continued'

Feature_6_Cinematic_Cards.details: 24 cards with 4:5 aspect ratio (aspect-[4/5]), hook text overlaid on darkened thumbnail

Feature_8_Urgency_Text.details: Urgency texts found: 'Someone just continued this', 'This story isn't finished', 'Your turn to continue', 'Be the one who writes what's next'

Feature_9_CTA_Variants.details: 3 CTA variants rotating: 'See What Happens Next', 'Continue This Story', 'What Happens Next?'

Feature_10_Stickiness_Trigger.details: Stickiness trigger found with gradient text: 'This story has no ending yet…', 'These stories are still being written…'

Feature_11_Infinite_Scroll.details: IntersectionObserver loads more stories on scroll (24 -> 36 cards)

Feature_12_End_Of_List.details: End of list message: 'You've explored all stories' with create CTA

Feature_14_Card_Click_Navigation.details: Card click navigates to /app/story-video-studio with remix_data prefilled (title, story text)

Feature_15_Backend_Explore_Endpoint.details: GET /api/engagement/explore returns stories, next_cursor, total, categories

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Explore endpoint is PUBLIC (no auth required).
